title: Our HEALing Voice
text:
Our HEALing Voice - SupportGoWhere
Our HEALing Voice
Share link
Provides a structured platform to empower persons with mental health conditions through sharing of their lived experience and peer mentoring.
SERVICE HIGHLIGHTS
Centre-based
Fees payable
Referral not required
SERVICE PROVIDERS
Find service providers near you
Collapse all sections
About this support

Structured 12 session training to equip clients with the skills to share their lived experience and provide peer mentoring/support to other peers.

Who is this for?

Recovered Persons with Mental Health Conditions (PMHCs); Individuals with no formal diagnosis of mental health condition(s) but exhibit signs and symptoms of mental health conditions that are assessed to be mild, manageable, and stable.

What to expect?

Structured 12 session training to equip clients with the skills to share their lived experience and provide peer mentoring/support.



Clients who completed OHV programme can join the OHV network to share their lived experience at Club HEAL’s outreach platforms and/or provide peer support to other PMHCs/individuals in distress.

How to apply?

Clients may be referred by healthcare professionals, social workers or come in through self-referral.



For self-referral:
OHV contact number - 9113 8052
OHV email - ourhealingvoice@clubheal.org.sg

Information last updated on 18 Sep 2025
